channel.title: BUbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Who is OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger? The millennial developer caught the attention of Sam Altman and Mark Zuckerberg
item.description: Steinberger made $100M off his first company and quit coding. Now he’s back to show the world the “magic” of agentic AI.

item.title: The Best Moments So Far at the Winter Olympics
item.description: Three writers and an Olympic medalist on the grit and grace of the winter games.

item.title: Europe Worries About Another Trump Blowup, This One on Tech
item.description: Even as trade tensions between the United States and the European Union seem to calm, officials are concerned that a showdown is brewing over the bloc...

item.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says AI spending still makes sense despite bubble fears
item.description: The Google CEO touched down in New Delhi this week with a string of new India investments in tow.

item.title: In Devastated Gaza, Grandiose Peace Plans Clash With Reality
item.description: Israeli strikes on Gaza have killed about 600 people since a cease-fire began, according to health officials in the territory. Many displaced Palestin...

item.title: Uber Moves to Enact Stricter Background Checks for Drivers
item.description: The New York Times revealed in December that the ride-hailing giant approved drivers with many types of criminal convictions, including violent feloni...

item.title: Despite a $400 million net worth and Hollywood career, Reese Witherspoon tells young people to stop chasing their dreams—and do this instead
item.description: Reese Witherspoon is telling young people to stop romanticizing the “dream job” and start getting brutally honest about what they’re actually good at.

item.title: Bill Gates pulls out of India’s AI summit at the last minute in the latest blow to an event dogged by organizational chaos
item.description: The Microsoft founder's abrupt withdrawal, amid renewed scrutiny over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, capped a chaotic few days for an event already dogg...

item.title: How Trump Is Making Sure His Ballroom Plans Sail Through
item.description: President Trump has installed allies — including his former receptionist — on the boards and commissions tasked with overseeing the project.

item.title: Elon Musk is pushing to build data centers in space. But they won’t solve AI’s power problems anytime soon
item.description: Proponents say orbital data centers could solve AI’s power and cooling crunch. Experts say that vision is far more distant than the hype suggests.

item.title: Live Updates: South Korean Ex-Leader Is Sentenced to Life in Prison
item.description: Former President Yoon Suk Yeol, who was impeached after he briefly imposed martial law in 2024, had faced a potential death sentence in the country’s ...

item.title: Here’s the latest.
item.description: The British police on Thursday arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor on suspicion of criminal activity linked to the Epstein files.

item.title: Besides Yoon, 5 other former officials get long prison terms.
Live Updates: U.K. Police Arrest Former Prince Andrew Over Epstein Ties, BBC Reports
item.description: The British police on Thursday arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor on suspicion of criminal activity linked to the Epstein files.

item.title: Europe Worries About Another Trump Blowup, This One on Tech
item.description: Even as trade tensions between the United States and the European Union seem to calm, officials are concerned that a showdown is brewing over the bloc...
